CustomField.description:
Represents the amount of time a study follow has been required
Notes: 1 is subtracted because follow up is not required until 1 day after the expected study date or last study follow up attempt
CustomField.formula: IF(AND(Study_Follow_up_Required__c, ISBLANK(Last_Study_Follow_up_Attempt__c)), NOW() - Expected_Study_Date__c - 1, IF(AND(Study_Follow_up_Required__c, NOT(ISBLANK(Last_Study_Follow_up_Attempt__c))), NOW() - Last_Study_Follow_up_Attempt__c - 1, NULL))*24
CustomField.label: Study Follow Up Required Time (Hours)
